title: Transcript:2022 Easter event
wikitext:
{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Easter Bunny|Karim|Shantay|Ali Morrisane|Suspicious crate|Phoebe Kay|Camarst|Xi_plzPetDogz_xiX|Xi plzPetDogz xiX|Ellis|Zeke}}

==Starting off==
===Talking to the Easter Bunny===
* '''Player:''' Hello there!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hi, [player name].
* '''Player:''' What are you doing here in the desert?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Well, it's Easter, and I'm delivering Easter eggs as I always do. However I'm in a bit of a sticky situation.
* '''Player:''' A sticky situation? What's happened?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Some of the adventurers I normally deliver to are deep in the desert doing adventurery things.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' You know, like hunting for ancient desert temples, fighting some big evil water storm, standard adventurer things.
* '''Player:''' Okay, that all sounds exciting, but why is that a problem?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' That's not specifically. It's the fact they're in the desert. Deserts are hot!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' The last time I tried to deliver Easter eggs in the desert, they all melted!
* '''Player:''' Hence the sticky situation!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Yes. Melted chocolate does not get on well with my fur. I don't want to go through that again!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' So I need to find a solution. I've came to Al Kharid since the people here know how to handle food in desert temperatures.
* '''Player:''' That's clever. Well, good luck. I hope you find the information you're looking for!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Wait! There is one other thing.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' It turns out that a giant pink rabbit like myself is quite frightening to people who haven't seen me before.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' I only managed to start speaking to one person before they realised it wasn't a costume. Now everybody is scared!
* '''Player:''' Oh, I can see why. You are a big rabbit! I've been on lots of adventures so I'm not really scared of anything anymore.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' BOO!
* '''Player:''' Ahhhhhhhh-*cough* I mean, almost got me!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' I see, very brave!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Well, since you're so brave, would you be able to help me out by asking some of the locals about my melting chocolate issue?
* '''Player:''' What is in it for me?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' I'll give you some super cool rewards of course! Although I'm not sure what they'll be yet...
* '''Easter Bunny:''' ...but I'm sure I'll find something super cool for you!
* {{tselect|Start the Easter 2022 event?}}
* {{topt|Sounds good to me!}}
** '''Player:''' Sounds good to me! Any idea on where to start?
** '''Easter Bunny:''' You could speak to Karim the kebab seller. He's the person I started speaking to before he realised I'm a big bunny and ran off.
** '''Easter Bunny:''' He'll definitely have some knowledge about food! His shop is just south-east of here.
** '''Player:''' I'll go and ask him. Will you stay here?
** '''Easter Bunny:''' Yes. A downside to being a big fluffy bunny is I don't get on too well with hot weather. So much fur.
** '''Easter Bunny:''' I thought about shaving it all off, but that would probably scare the locals even more.
** '''Player:''' It most definitely would!
** '''Easter Bunny:''' What?
** '''Player:''' I said it most definitely wouldn't! And that there is no need to anyway now that I am here to help.
** '''Easter Bunny:''' Thank you! I'll stay here by the coast where it's a bit cooler. See you soon, good luck!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Nah, I'm busy.}}
** '''Player:''' Nah, I'm busy. I might have some time later!
** '''Easter Bunny:''' Okay. Please come back if you do get some time, these eggs need delivering!
** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to the Easter Bunny after declining to start the event====
* '''Player:''' Hi, Easter Bunny.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hey, [player name]. Do you have some time to help me now?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' I could really use the help to find out how to deliver these eggs without them melting!
* {{tselect|Start the Easter 2022 event?}}
* {{topt|Sounds good to me!}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|Nah, I'm still busy.}}
** '''Player:''' Nah, I'm still busy. I might have some time later!
** '''Easter Bunny:''' Okay. Please come back if you do get some time, these eggs need delivering!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the Easter Bunny after starting the event===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hi, [player name]. How is it going? Found anything out yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet, I still need to talk to Karim.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Don't take too long, we need to get some eggs delivered!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Karim is in his kebab shop just south-east of here.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Karim===
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello, Karim. The Easter Bunny told me to talk to you.
** '''Karim:''' Oh, he spoke to me earlier. I thought it was a guy in a costume, not a huge bunny. Scared me half to death when I realised!
** '''Karim:''' I feel bad now though. He's not actually scary, it was just a bit of a shock! I wish there was a way to say sorry.
** '''Player:''' Maybe you can help me out then? I'm helping the Easter Bunny and I've got a question I'd like to ask you.
** '''Karim:''' Certainly, I'll do my best. What would you like to know?
** '''Player:''' Well, the Easter Bunny needs to deliver some chocolate eggs to some adventurers deep in the desert.
** '''Player:''' But chocolate and heat don't mix well. So we're trying to find a way to stop them from melting on their travels.
** '''Karim:''' Hmm...
** '''Karim:''' I haven't really had that issue myself so it's not something I've ever had to solve. Kebabs don't really melt.
** '''Karim:''' Some would say they're actually hotter than the desert if you consider some of the sauces I use!
** '''Karim:''' You could talk to Shantay though. He's south of Al Kharid at the pass.
** '''Karim:''' Most comings and goings to the desert pass past him, so he's likely to have an idea!
** '''Player:''' I'll go and ask him, thank you.
** '''Karim:''' Sorry I couldn't be of more help. I hope you find the information you're looking for.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about other things.}}

====Talking to Karim again====
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello, Karim. I can't remember who you suggested I talk to.
** '''Karim:''' Shantay! He can be found in the path just south of Al Kharid.
** '''Player:''' Ah yes, thank you. I'll head there now.
** '''Karim:''' Good luck!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about other things.}}

====Talking to the Easter Bunny after talking to Karim====
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hi, [player name]. How is it going? Found anything out yet?
* '''Player:''' I've made some progress! I've spoken to Karim who told to talk to a man named Shantay.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Do you know where Shantay is?
* '''Player:''' Yes, Karim said he's just south of Al Kharid.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Okay, you better be off then! We need to get some eggs delivered.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Shantay===
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello, Shantay. Karim sent me here. He said you might be able to help me with something.
** '''Shantay:''' Help you? That depends on what it is. Ask away.
** '''Player:''' I'm looking for a way to keep something cool as it travels through the desert.
** '''Player:''' Specifically chocolate. It just keeps melting!
** '''Shantay:''' Hmm...
** '''Shantay:''' I see a lot of food items go through the pass day to day, however I don't pay too much attention to that.
** '''Shantay:''' Regardless, I'm not sure I've ever seen chocolate go through.
** '''Shantay:''' There is one person I can think of who may know something on this topic.
** '''Shantay:''' He has trade dealings with people all over the world.
** '''Player:''' Who is it?
** '''Shantay:''' Ali Morrisane. He runs a market stall at the north edge of Al Kharid.
** '''Shantay:''' If anyone can help with this, he can.
** '''Player:''' Thank you, I'll go and ask him.
** '''Shantay:''' You're welcome.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about other things.}}

====Talking to Shantay again====
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello, Shantay. Could you remind me who I should talk to?
** '''Shantay:''' Ali Morrisane. You can find him at his market stall on the north side of Al Kharid.
** '''Player:''' Thanks!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about other things.}}

====Talking to the Easter Bunny after talking to Shantay====
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hi, [player name]. How is it going? Found anything out yet?
* '''Player:''' I've spoken to Karim, who sent me to Shantay, who told me to talk to a man named Ali Morrisane.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Do you know where Ali Morrisane is?
* '''Player:''' Yes, Shantay said he's just north of Al Kharid at his market stall.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Okay, you better be off then! We need to get some eggs delivered.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ali Morrisane===
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hey, Ali!
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Hi there, [player name]. How can I help you?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Would you like to browse my wares?
** '''Player:''' Err, not right now. I've actually come to ask you a question.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' A question? I do know many things. But as with all things, information doesn't come free.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' What is your question? Then I can decide on a price for you.
** '''Player:''' Do you have any idea on how to stop chocolate melting in the desert heat?
** '''Player:''' I'm helping the Easter Bunny out, and he needs to deliver some chocolate eggs to some adventurers south in the desert, but the eggs just melt!
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Hmm...
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' I do have some information that might help you. However as I said, it's not free.
** '''Player:''' What do you want in return?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Do me a quick favour. It won't take long.
** '''Player:''' And in return, you'll tell me what you know?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Yes. A deal is a deal.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' An associate of mine has information for me. I need you to collect their report and bring it to me.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' They're hiding on the south-west coast near the bank. They'll be hidden, but should be easy to find now you know they're there.
** '''Player:''' Why can't they just bring it to you?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' They can't be seen near me. It's a business thing, very complicated. It would take too long to explain.
** '''Player:''' Riiiigggghhhht. That doesn't sound shady at all!
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Good, because it definitely isn't.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' You should probably take this. My associate can be quite suspicious.
** {{tcond|If the player has no inventory space:}}
*** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Oh, never mind, you don't have space for it. Come back to me when you're ready.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tbox|pic=Special hot sauce detail.png|Ali hands you a bottle of special hot sauce.}}
** '''Player:''' Special hot sauce? Why do I need that? How will that help with their suspicion?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Don't worry for now, you'll know if you need it.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Go and meet my associate. Once you bring their report to me, I'll tell you what I know.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about other things.}}

====Talking to the Easter Bunny before getting the special hot sauce====
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Hi, [player name]. How is it going? Found anything out yet?

===Talking to the Easter Bunny after getting the special hot sauce===

==Getting the report==
===Talking to suspicious crate===
* '''Player:''' Hello?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' There is nobody here, go away.
* '''Player:''' I've been sent here by Ali Morrisane!
* '''Suspicious crate:''' I don't know any Ali Morrisane.
* '''Suspicious crate:''' I mean, I'm a box, I can't know people.
* '''Player:''' I can quite clearly see that you're not a box, you're talking to me!
* '''Suspicious crate:''' I... fine. Hello. You say that Ali sent you?
* '''Player:''' Yes. But first, who are you?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' That's of no concern to you.
* '''Player:''' ...Okay.
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Sorry, I'm just protecting business interests. Why did Ali send you?
* '''Player:''' He said I should collect something from you and bring it to him, a report or something.
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Prove it.
* '''Player:''' Prove what?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Prove that Ali sent you!
* '''Player:''' How can I do that? I don't even know who you are or what the report is about!
* '''Player:''' I do have... this.
* {{tbox|pic=Special hot sauce detail.png|You show the special hot sauce to the crate.}}
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Is that... special hot sauce? Let me smell it.
* {{tbox|pic=Special hot sauce detail.png|You hold the special hot sauce up close to the side of the crate.}}
* '''Suspicious crate:''' *sniff sniff*
* '''Suspicious crate:''' AAAAHHHHHHHHHH IT BURNS.
* '''Suspicious crate:''' It's so hot! My nose is on fire!
* '''Player:''' Are you okay? Do I need to get someone?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' It's...
* '''Suspicious crate:''' ...lovely! So much heat, such intense warmth, I can't feel my face!
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Okay, I believe you. There is only one person who has that!
* '''Suspicious crate:''' I'd like you to do me a favour before I hand over the report though.
* '''Player:''' Of course. What is it?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' Pick me up a special super hot kebab, made with this sauce. I haven't had one of those in ages.
* '''Player:''' You want to eat this? After the reaction you just had from smelling it?
* '''Suspicious crate:''' It's much more tame when eaten, don't worry. Karim knows how to make them.
* '''Player:''' Okay, I guess. I'll go and fetch you a kebab.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to the suspicious crate again====

* '''Suspicious crate:''' Do you have my kebab yet?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.

** '''Player:''' Yes please. It's not actually for me, it's for a friend. They like really hot food.
** '''Karim:''' I think this may be a step further than really hot food.
** '''Karim:''' Can I take the sauce? I'll see what I can do.
** {{tbox|pic=Special hot sauce detail.png|You hand the special hot sauce to Karim.}}
** '''Karim:''' Thanks. Give me one second, I'll whip something up.
** '''Karim:''' Here we go. I'd probably wear gloves if I were you.

** '''Player:''' Thanks.
** '''Karim:''' Good luck to whoever is eating that!
** {{tact|end}}

* '''Player:''' Err, how? You're inside a crate.

===Talking to Ali Morrisane===
* {{topt|Talk about the Easter event.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi there, Ali!
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Hello [player name], how goes the mission?
** {{tcond|If the player lost the report:}}
*** '''Player:''' I had the report... but I've lost it somewhere.
*** '''Ali Morrisane:''' You what?! You lost it?! It's full of important information!
*** '''Player:''' I mean I accidently destroyed it, it's gone, don't worry!
*** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Okay, panic over. You should go back to my associate and collect a new copy, I do actually want to read it.
*** '''Player:''' I'll do that now.
*** {{tact|end}}
** '''Player:''' I have the report right here!
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Lovely, hand it over.
** {{tbox|pic=Secret report detail.png|You hand the report over to Ali Morrisane.}}
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Thank you.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Hmm, interesting. Very interesting.
** '''Player:''' What is?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' I wonder if, yes, that may work. Definitely.
** '''Player:''' What?
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' Sorry, I was just giving the report a quick look over. Very interesting stuff, but I'll deal with it properly later.
** '''Ali Morrisane:''' So, a deal is a deal. What was your question again?
** '''Player:''' I'm looking for a way to stop chocolate melting in the desert heat.
